headline: AVGO Boosts AI Growth With New Optical, Ethernet Tech: What's Ahead?
summary: Broadcom unveils 400G optical DSP, 102.4T switches and 3.5D XPU at OFC, boosting AI networking push as revenue and AI demand surge into fiscal 2026.
